title: Netherite Extras x Fresh Animations Extensions
description: Official compatibility pack for Netherite Extras to work with "Fresh Animations Extensions - Classic Horses Edit"
body:
# Netherite Extras x Fresh Animations Extensions

This pack is the official compatibility patch for the Netherite Horse Armor from [Netherite Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherite-extras/versions) to make it work with the Classic Horses Edit in [Fresh Animations - Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX).

![Texture of the Netherite Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k7lj6vot/images/da8830571232ac2b31e66de839e72dc202bb9a8f.webp)

## Instructions

<details>
<summary>Show Instructions</summary>

1. Download the resource pack and place it in your resource pack directory
2. Move the pack to be higher than both Fresh Animations and Fresh Animations Extensions

![Hierarchy of how the resource packs have to be placed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d9c79c29bac7db9593ddbe64e5077af514fbd8d_0.webp)

</details>

## Context

[Netherite Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherite-extras/versions) by [SLH](https://modrinth.com/user/SLH) is a vanilla-friendly mod that adds more uses for Netherite, including a Netherite Horse Armor, among other things.

[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) is a resource pack that gives an animation overhaul to the creatures in the default look of Minecraft.

Classic Horses Edit is a part of [Fresh Animations - Extensions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-extensions) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) that gives horses a detailed model resembling the original horse model from Minecraft 1.12 and earlier.

## Credits

- [Proxi](https://modrinth.com/user/proxi): making the Netherite Horse Armor texture compatible with FA Classic Horses
- [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX): Creator of Fresh Animations
- [SLH](https://modrinth.com/user/SLH): Creator of Netherite Extras
